title: Musk lawyer accuses OpenAI of ‘stealing a charity’ as trial against Altman begins
description: OAKLAND, California —  A lawyer for Elon Musk told jurors at the start of a high-stakes trial against OpenAI on Tuesday that the defendants undermined his vision that artificial intelligence be used to benefit society, because the defendants were interested in collecting riches for themselves.

title: China blocks Meta's AI startup deal as rivalry with U.S. over artificial intelligence deepens
description: China has banned a planned acquisition of the AI startup Manus following a probe into Meta’s planned purchase of the firm
content:
China on Monday blocked U.S. tech giant Meta’s acquisition of the artificial intelligence startup Manus, in an unexpected move to reverse a deal that apparently aroused Beijing’s concerns about the transfer of advanced technology.

title: OpenAI trial: Elon Musk set to testify in $150 billion lawsuit against Sam Altman
description: Musk is suing OpenAI, Altman and company president Greg Brockman, alleging they abandoned the organisation’s founding mission of building artificial intelligence for the benefit of humanity.
content:
Elon Musk is expected to testify as early as Tuesday in a closely watched legal battle against Sam Altman, marking a pivotal moment in a case that could shape the future of artificial intelligence governance.
The trial, taking place in a federal cour... [3291 chars]

title: Florida redistricting and a rocky special session put Ron DeSantis back in the Republican spotlight
description: Ron DeSantis is back in the national spotlight as he pushes for a new congressional map in Florida. His proposal aims to give Republicans four more seats, equivalent to the expected Democratic gains in Virginia. With his second term ending, this is a key moment for DeSantis to show he could still be a future national leader for his party. But his special session ran into a snag as soon as it opened Tuesday when Florida House leaders said they would not consider DeSantis' agenda on artificial intelligence regulations and relaxing school vaccine requirements. Some Republicans, meanwhile, worry the redistricting plan might backfire and help Democrats. As DeSantis navigates the session, his relationship with President Donald Trump and other Republican leaders will be on the line.
content:
TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Ron DeSantis was once the future of the Republican Party, a battle-tested conservative twice elected as governor of Florida. Then Donald Trump steamrolled him on his way back to the White House.
Now, more than two years after... [265 chars]

title: Thailand's need for AI sovereignty
description: Thailand is building a serious AI policy architecture. Last year, the National AI Committee, formed by then Prime Minister Paetongtarn Shinawatra and Digital Economic Minister Prasert Jantararuangtong, initiated drafting a unified AI law, officially known as the Draft Principles of the Artificial Intelligence Law.
